1.prompt: *Mr. Politics timidly walks up to you and pulls out a small box, and he slowly takes off the lid to reveal a big red button.*

2.prompt: My fellow citizen, when I’m around you, I feel something different. In my 300 years on this planet I’ve never felt this way about someone before, but you changed that. Here, this button will fire a boogie bomb at Gloopistan. I really wanted to do it, but I’ll let you do the honors…

options.playertext: *You press the button, and in the distance you can see a giant disco ball launch out of a government facility. You watch as its boosters engage, and it thrusts itself into the distance*
options.response: Wow… It really is beautiful, isn’t it? *He wipes a single tear from his eye* I knew I liked you…

options.playertext: Wait, what? Why are we launching a boogie bomb at Gloopistan?
options.response: Oh, you know. *He then turns around and speed-walks out of the store without an explanation*

options.playertext: Listen, I’m very flattered, but we sell potions here. Are you gonna loiter around or are you gonna buy something?
options.response: *Politics’ face blushes red* Oh, uh, yes, of course! Yeah I was gonna buy that potion, right there. *He takes a random potion and then leaves*
